about.title: About
about.heading: I build systems that hold up.
paragraphs: Full-stack software engineer based in Repentigny, Greater Montréal. Bilingual EN/FR, currently studying B.Eng. in Software Engineering at ÉTS, I have been shipping web products since 2022.

My approach: ship to production, not just demos. The Mad Space runs today with ~15,000 LOC, 20+ REST APIs, multi-currency Stripe payments (4 currencies), and 4 business workflows that cut order processing by 10–15 minutes.

Before product development, I resolved 2,000+ tickets at Vidéotron with 94% customer satisfaction (NPS 9.6/10) and automated ~50% of tasks via Power Automate. I learned to listen before coding, and to diagnose before proposing.
about.caption: Ralph Christian Gabriel — Repentigny, QC

items.desc: Configuration and integration of TMS solutions via database setup. Google Maps integration (geocoding). Structured Test → Dev → Production deployment with GitLab CI/CD Pipelines. Stack: Spring Boot, Angular.

Designed and shipped a full-stack e-commerce platform (~15,000 LOC, 20+ REST APIs). 10 Prisma/PostgreSQL models, multi-role auth, i18n (2 languages), multi-currency (4 currencies). 4 business workflows integrating Stripe, Gelato, Google Merchant Center. Vercel/Supabase deployment, advanced security (rate limiting, webhook signature, HttpOnly cookies, audit logs).
2,000+ tickets handled (AHT 11:18, 94% sat., NPS 9.6/10). Automated ~50% of tasks via Power Automate (HR/IT/Finance). Documented procedures and runbooks to stabilize deployments.
